no: Made in Heaven Tweaks v2 by Angel. 10 components: spell tweaks, challenge tweaks, and stat table revisions. Stat tables (cn:7-9) incompatible with ToF Revised Ability Scores and SubtleD Stat Overhauls

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks save penalties and MiH Tweaks Spell Level affects Saving Throws both modify save calculations. Don't mix
Both modify ability score modifiers (STR, DEX, CON). Use one or the other
MiH cn:7/8/9 rewrite strmod/dexmod/hpconbon.2da. ToF cn:80000 also rewrites these files. Last installed wins.
conflicts.myComps: #7 Revised Strength #8 Revised Dexterity #9 Revised Constitution

conflicts.reason: Both modify Protection from Evil spell. MiH cn:3 dynamically scans all domination spells; TnT cn:54 is a simpler PnP-style fix. Use one.
Both increase creature HP. MiH cn:6 adds bonus HP per HD by creature type (configurable). TR cn:25-30 apply blanket multipliers. Stacking makes enemies extremely tanky.
Both rewrite stat modifier 2DA files. Last installed wins.
conflicts.myComps: #7 Revised Strength #8 Revised Dexterity #9 Revised Constitution

conflicts.reason: Tactics Remix auto-skips all components when Made in Heaven mods are detected.
fullplate cn:1 corrupts AC#WCOHD.ITM from 794 to 746 bytes via COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP on all ITM files. Breaks MiH Tweaks weapon-patching components.

ki.pattern: ERROR Installing \[Alternative Damage on Large Creatures\]
ki.description: Alternative Damage on Large Creatures has REQUIRE: not IWD — component fails if IWD1_EET is detected in the install. Also patches ALL weapon items, which can fail if an earlier mod left a corrupted item in override.
ki.workaround: Skip this component if IWD1_EET is installed. If IWD1_EET is not installed and it still fails, check for corrupted .ITM files in override from earlier mod failures.

sum: Made in Heaven's tweak package: 10 quality-of-life and balance adjustments for the combined EET game.

co.no: PnP-inspired alternative damage dice against large creatures (e.g. longsword 1d12 vs large instead of 1d8). Patches all weapon items. REQUIRE: not IWD.

co.n: Cap charges of Wands and Staves
co.tp2n: Cap charges of Wands and Staves
co.no: Caps wand/staff charges. Can be slow (patches many items). Forgotten Armament cn:33-35 offers wand uses-per-day as alternative.
Higher-level spells impose save penalties. Scans all spell files. Don't combine with cdtweaks cn:2310-2312 (Save Penalties) — overlapping mechanics cause double penalties.

Scans ALL spells/items for domination effects, then adds Protection from Spell to every Protection from Evil spell/item. More comprehensive than TnT cn:54 (PnP ProtEvil) which is a simpler static fix. Use one or the other.
BETA: Adds ability to dismiss active spell buffs. Experimental — may cause issues with some spell interactions.
DEPRECATED by mod author — 'Not ready yet.' IWD-style spell icons. Do not use.

Adds bonus HP per hit die to creatures by type (animals, undead, giant humanoids, monsters). Configurable via ini. More granular than Tactics Remix HP multiplier (blanket x2). Use one approach or the other.
Rewrites strmod.2da. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 (Ability Score Modifiers) if installed after. Also conflicts with tb#tweaks cn:4000 and SubtleD cn:100.
Rewrites dexmod.2da. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 if installed after. Also conflicts with tb#tweaks cn:4500 and SubtleD cn:100.
Rewrites hpconbon.2da. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 if installed after. Also conflicts with tb#tweaks cn:5000, Bart_Tweaks cn:3040, and SubtleD cn:100.
